name: Software Development Lifecycle
description: Standard SDLC process with human gates at Requirements, Design, and Deployment. Implementation and Testing are automated by AI agents. Supports variable project parameters and templated outputs.

metadata.author: SimDecisions
metadata.intention: Execute a complete SDLC process with human gates at key stages and AI-assisted implementation and testing

variables.name: project_description
variables.description: High-level description of the project goals and scope

variables.name: output_format
variables.description: Format for generated documentation and artifacts

nodes.name: Requirements Gathering
nodes.description: Define project requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria for {{project_name}}.

nodes.name: System Design
nodes.description: Create system architecture, component design, and technical specifications for {{project_name}}.

nodes.name: Implementation
nodes.description: Implement the approved design for {{project_name}}. Generate code, configurations, and infrastructure setup in {{output_format}} format.

nodes.name: Testing & QA
nodes.description: Generate and execute test plans for {{project_name}}. Produce test results, coverage reports, and quality metrics.

nodes.name: Deployment
nodes.description: Review implementation and test results. Approve and execute deployment of {{project_name}}.
